title: euphrasia arctica var. mollis
intro: Euphrasia arctica var. mollis, also known as Arctic Eyebright, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Euphrasia arctica var. mollis include its ability to soothe sore eyes, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant often include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
